focus: causal & relation-inference integrity (relation-backfill.ts conflict-guard, honest-count delta, dryRun safety, contradiction-detection, causal_unlink, backfillJob.implemented)
noveltyJustification: Two new P2 advisories (reciprocal contradicts coexistence via new opt-in collector; dryRun double-default verified-safe). Both charter A3 P0 hypotheses (conflict-guard invalidates valid edges incl reciprocal/3-node transitive; honest-count double-count) adversarially DISPROVEN. Weighted new=2 over weighted total=14 (prior P1x2=10 + prior P2x2=2 + new P2x2=2).

findingDetails.title: New opt-in contradicts collector can create reciprocal-contradictory edge pairs the system never reconciles
findingDetails.evidence: hasConflictingValidEdge (692-709) and detectContradictions (88) both query only source_id=?,target_id=? (directional). New opt-in supersession->contradicts collector (474,317) materializes A-contradicts-B while B-supports-A stays valid; no path reconciles reciprocal contradictions.
findingDetails.recommendation: Advisory: future whole-graph work could add reciprocal/transitive contradiction reconciliation. Guard itself is correct-by-design (faithfully mirrors detectContradictions). Low blast radius: collector default OFF, strength 0.3.
findingDetails.scopeProof: relation-backfill.ts 100% new; opt-in wiring causal-graph.ts:277-278 new; inherited directional limit at contradiction-detection.ts:88 is 1/1 line in range = pre-existing model
affectedSurfaceHints: graph readers treating contradicts as bidirectional

claimAdjudication.claim: New opt-in contradicts collector materializes reciprocal-contradictory edge pairs the directional contradiction model never reconciles.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Both guard and detectContradictions query only the directional pair; pairKey (234-236) is order-normalized but used only for similarity-vs-spec-chain dedup, not conflict detection.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Guard is correct-by-design (mirrors detectContradictions); gap is a pre-existing directional-model property, not the new file. Hence P2 advisory not P1/P0.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: Would be not-a-finding if contradicts collector were permanently off, but it is a user-reachable opt-in.

findingDetails.title: memory_causal_stats backfill wiring applies dryRun default twice (verified-safe, clarity advisory)
findingDetails.evidence: Handler passes dryRun: backfillRequest.dryRun !== false (274); library re-applies dryRun = options.dryRun !== false (355). Both default TRUE; non-inverting at both layers (false!==false=false, undefined!==false=true). No behavioral defect; safety contract duplicated.
findingDetails.recommendation: Keep single source of truth in the library; handler pre-normalization is belt-and-suspenders. No fix required for correctness.
findingDetails.scopeProof: both lines new in range (handler wiring 260-310 added; library file 100% new)

claimAdjudication.claim: dryRun default applied at both handler and library layers; verify no inversion.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Evaluated both layers for false/undefined inputs; both resolve identically and fail-safe to dryRun=true.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: Pure-clarity; not a behavioral correctness finding.

traceabilityChecks: backfillJob.implemented=true is HONEST (relation-coverage.ts:113; backfill genuinely implemented at relation-backfill.ts 748 LOC, wired causal-graph.ts:273) — charter A7 implemented=false hypothesis REFUTED
hasConflictingValidEdge mirrors detectContradictions valid-edge query as docstring claims (backfill 701-703 == detection 88-89) — VERIFIED
range integrity via git numstat: relation-backfill.ts 748/0 new, contradiction-detection.ts 1/1 pre-existing, causal-edges.ts deleteEdge unchanged

honest-count delta (snapshot 532 vs 568) idempotent on re-run; skippedConflicting not folded into written; safe under single synchronous transaction

iteration-number ambiguity: strict-serial=3 vs dispatch parallel=4; honored dispatch=4 per parallel-safety, no shared-state write
ruledOut: conflict guard invalidates valid edges (charter A3 P0) — REFUTED: guard skips, never calls invalidateEdge
3-node transitive contradiction cycle (charter A3) — NOT A NEW DEFECT: contradiction-detection.ts is same-pair-only and pre-existing (1/1 line in range); never claimed transitive
